---
title: "Read results for ITS and COI"
format: html
editor: visual
---

## ITS

```{bash}
# short = FALSE, keep_NA = FALSE
Rscript read_result_its.R FALSE FALSE

# short = FALSE, keep_NA = TRUE
Rscript read_result_its.R FALSE TRUE

# short = TRUE, keep_NA = FALSE
Rscript read_result_its.R TRUE FALSE

# short = TRUE, keep_NA = TRUE
Rscript read_result_its.R TRUE TRUE

```

## COI 

```{bash}

# short = FALSE, keep_NA = FALSE, datatype = nt
Rscript read_result_coi.R FALSE FALSE nt

# short = FALSE, keep_NA = TRUE, datatype = nt
Rscript read_result_coi.R FALSE TRUE nt

# short = TRUE, keep_NA = FALSE, datatype = nt
Rscript read_result_coi.R TRUE FALSE nt

# short = TRUE, keep_NA = TRUE, datatype = nt
Rscript read_result_coi.R TRUE TRUE nt
```
